description: An elevated view of the Pont Neuf bridge in Paris on a foggy day. Horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians cross the busy bridge, which spans a misty river below. Tall apartment buildings with pale facades rise beyond the bridge. Streetlamps and bare trees dot the scene. The entire composition is bathed in a soft, hazy atmosphere of grays, yellows, and muted earth tones, with the distant cathedral towers barely visible through the fog.
